summary: Comprehensive testing of updated accommodation system: Backend 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend all accommodation features verified - tier-based default fees, premium hotels, self-accommodation with suggested hotels, and FREE accommodation for eligible categories (academic). All features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: TEST_Academic_Member created and deleted for free accommodation testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Accommodation system fully tested. Backend: fee_tiers with accommodation_fees per category persists correctly. Frontend: Step 3 shows Default (tier fee), Premium Hotels, Self (₹0 with suggested hotels info). Academic members in free_categories see 'Free Accommodation (Default)' with FREE label. Step 4 fee breakdown correctly shows Registration Fee + Accommodation Fee = Total.
